pattern: DP on intervals: precompute the minimum edits to make each substring a palindrome, then DP to partition into k palindromes.
hints: Precompute cost[i][j] = minimum character changes to make s[i..j] a palindrome using two-pointer comparison.
Define dp[p][c] = min changes to partition s[0..p] into c palindromes; transition tries all split points.
Base case dp[p][1] = cost[0][p]; final answer is dp[len-1][k].

edge_inputs.description: leetcode k=8 one char per partition
k equals length: each char is its own palindrome, cost 0
all same chars any split is free

stress.description: Random lowercase string with random k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    length = rng.randint(1, size)
    s = ''.join(chr(ord('a') + rng.randint(0, 25)) for _ in range(length))
    k = rng.randint(1, length)
    return [s, k]
